body.summary: Review LOCK 009 spec for Tripp.Control governance trace/decision record module.
body.context: Tripp.Control is a local-first governance spine for multi-agent builds. LOCK 009 adds deterministic governance trace + decision record layer.
body.spec_location: Eddie shared full spec in conversation — see artifacts for extracted spec
tripp_feedback: CRITICAL: Spec says 'no persistent storage' but wants reviewable records. Traces in memory are lost on process exit. Suggest allowing filesystem serialization as part of Markdown report exception.
Consider structured evidence objects (source, field, value, severity) instead of flat strings for easier filtering/rendering
Clarify distinction between decision_factors (technical) vs review_items (human-facing)
Module outputs inclusion could bloat traces — consider summaries vs full objects
Trace versioning for re-evaluated tasks (same task_id, new attempt)
body.your_job: Review the LOCK 009 spec. Identify gaps, improvements, or issues. Return your feedback as structured review items.
body.output_format: JSON response with review_items array. Each item: {severity, category, description, suggestion}
